meta.title: AI Game Connect — Connect, Compete, Rank & Get Rewarded
meta.description: AI Game Connect helps players find real-life games and sports, compete in approved places, track rankings, and unlock rewards through safe, organized communities.

hero.title: Connect. Compete. Rank. Get Rewarded.
hero.body: AI Game Connect helps players find real-life games and sports, compete in healthy environments, track rankings, and earn rewards — all through approved venues, fields, and courts.
hero.differentiator: Not another group chat — track your rank, get matched to real games, and get rewarded for showing up.
hero.badge: Founding Player & Venue spots open — early members get priority access to tournaments and rewards.
hero.trust: No betting. No gambling. Approved places only.

sections.title: Connect → Compete → Rank → Reward
sections.body: A simple loop for discovering activities, joining trusted places, competing fairly, and tracking progress.

items.title: Connect
items.body: Find players, venues, fields, courts, and game opportunities around your area.

items.title: Compete
items.body: Join organized matches and competitions with clear rules, times, and locations.

items.title: Rank
items.body: Track progress across the activities you love through fair, verified participation.

items.title: Reward
items.body: Unlock recognition, badges, partner offers, and future rewards as the network grows.

statementLines: This Is Not Another Group Chat.
sections.body: AI Game Connect is building a safer way for players to find real games, compete in approved places, track rankings, and unlock future rewards - with clear times, locations, pricing, and rules.

sections.title: Choose Your Path Into the Ecosystem
sections.body: Start from the role that fits how you want to help the community grow.

items.title: Players
items.body: Find games, compete, track ranking, and receive reward updates.

items.title: Venues
items.body: Receive organized player demand and trusted traffic through approved spaces.

items.title: Competition Partners
items.body: Support future tournaments, rewards, and community activity as the network grows.

sections.title: What You Can Play
sections.body: Start with the real-life competitive activities players already love.

items.title: Football
items.body: Teams, fields, challenges, and local tournaments.

items.title: Padel
items.body: Court-based matches, doubles, and area ranking.

items.title: Board games
items.body: Social, strategic, and venue-hosted game nights.

items.title: PlayStation
items.body: Friendly competitions and approved venue events.

items.title: Chess
items.body: Skill-based play, rankings, and fair competition.

items.title: Dominoes
items.body: Organized tables, verified results, and local play.

items.title: More activities coming soon.
items.body: The ecosystem can grow with safe, approved real-life play.

sections.title: What Real Play Can Look Like
sections.body: Small, clear moments the ecosystem is designed to support as the community grows.

items.title: A football match after work
items.body: Players can request nearby fields and clear times.

items.title: A padel game with new players
items.body: Court requests can connect doubles without scattered planning.

items.title: A chess challenge at an approved venue
items.body: Skill-based play can happen in a trusted public place.

items.title: A PlayStation competition with clear rules
items.body: Friendly competition can stay organized and transparent.

items.title: A leaderboard update after verified play
items.body: Future ranking movement can follow confirmed participation.

items.title: A reward notification for active players
items.body: Future rewards can recognize consistent, fair activity.

sections.title: Meet Dawrak, your AI game assistant.
sections.body: Dawrak is being built to make game requests, updates, venue details, rankings, and rewards easier to follow.

items.title: Request a game
items.body: Share what you want to play, where, and when.

items.title: Receive game requests
items.body: Get matched with players looking for the same activity.

items.title: Get venue location
items.body: See approved place details before confirmation.

items.title: Competition dates/times
items.body: Follow upcoming competition schedules when they launch.

items.title: Leaderboard movement
items.body: Receive future updates after verified participation.

items.title: Rewards notifications
items.body: Get notified when badges and rewards become available.

sections.title: Tournaments built around real players and real places.
sections.body: Tournament content stays honest, local, and connected to approved venues.

items.title: Local tournaments
items.body: Area-based competitions for nearby communities.

items.title: Venue-hosted competitions
items.body: Events organized with approved partner venues.

items.title: Area challenges
items.body: Friendly neighborhood and city-area challenges.

items.title: Seasonal competitions
items.body: Future seasonal campaigns as the network grows.

items.title: Sponsored competitions
items.body: Partner-backed competitions when the ecosystem is ready.

sections.title: Track your rank across the games you love.
sections.body: Preview only — real rankings and player profiles are coming soon.
sections.previewLabel: Preview only — ranking profiles are coming soon.

sections.title: Play, compete, and unlock rewards.
sections.body: Rewards will grow gradually as more players, venues, and partners join.

items.title: Venue discounts
items.body: Future discounts with approved partner venues.

items.title: Competition prizes
items.body: Recognition and prizes for verified events.

items.title: Player recognition
items.body: Badges and leaderboard-based recognition.

items.title: Badges
items.body: Profile badges for participation and fair play.

items.title: Partner offers
items.body: Offers from future trusted partners.

items.title: Leaderboard-based rewards
items.body: Rewards connected to verified ranking progress.

sections.title: Bring organized player demand to approved places.
sections.body: AI Game Connect helps venues become part of a trusted activity ecosystem.

items.title: More Organized Demand
items.body: Stop relying on walk-ins. Get matched with players actively looking to book, compete, and return.

items.title: Built-In Visibility
items.body: Appear inside the ecosystem's activity, tournament, and leaderboard pages — not just a map pin.

items.title: Trusted, Verified Players
items.body: Every player agrees to the same safety standards you do — no betting, no gambling, no private arrangements.

sections.title: Safety & Clear Rules
sections.body: No betting. No gambling. No poker. No private places. Approved venues, fields, courts, and activity spaces only. Clear time, location, pricing, and rules.

sections.title: From registration to rewards.
sections.body: A clear preview flow for players and venues.

items.title: Register
items.body: Join as a player or register a venue for review.

items.title: Choose activities
items.body: Select the games and sports you care about.

items.title: Use Dawrak
items.body: Request games and receive helpful updates when available.

items.title: Join approved places
items.body: Play at approved venues, fields, and courts.

items.title: Compete
items.body: Take part in organized matches and competitions.

items.title: Track ranking
items.body: Follow preview ranking movement after verified play.

items.title: Get rewards
items.body: Unlock future badges, recognition, and offers.

sections.title: Be Part of the Founding Player and Venue Community.
sections.body: Register early to help shape where AI Game Connect launches first, which activities get prioritized, and how rankings and rewards grow.

items.title: Founding Players
items.body: Share what you want to play, where you are, and which activities should launch first.

items.title: Founding Venues
items.body: Tell us about your approved space and how players can use it for organized play.
